title: `check` takes excessively long on a specific module from cva6
body:
[CVA6](https://github.com/openhwgroup/cva6) is being used as a testcase for the adder overflow formal app, but it doesn't get past the initial stages because it gets stuck in `check` (early on in `prep`).

To reproduce, clone the repo, then set some environment variables used in the flist file:
```
export CVA6_REPO_DIR=`pwd`
export HPDCACHE_DIR=$CVA6_REPO_DIR/core/cache_subsystem/hpdcache
export TARGET_CFG=cv64a6_imafdc_sv39
```
Yosys script:
```
verific -f -sv ./core/Flist.cva6
hierarchy -top cva6
check
```

The formal app uses flatten but it's reproducible without, `check` gets stuck in the `csr_regfile(...)` module specifically in the non-flattened design. This module only has 1791 cells, so something pathological must be going on...
